name: USEN-NEXT HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd.
summary: Usen-Next Holdings Co.,Ltd. offers entertainment services. Its content platform business engages in planning, developing, operating, and marketing U-NEXT, a video distribution service; and the provision of application development and infrastructure distribution services. The company also provides multi-MVNO cheap SIM, and cheap smartphone services; offers fixed-line telecommunications and optical Internet services; and operates contact centers. The company was formerly known as U-Next Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Usen-Next Holdings Co.,Ltd. in December 2017. Usen-Next Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Usen-Next Holdings Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of UNO-HOLDINGS Co., Ltd.
